name: snomed_direct_xlingual_verify_v1
description: Non-generative confidence check: instead of round-tripping a candidate Korean translation through an LLM (which launders errors), score it DIRECTLY in the multilingual BGE-M3 space against the source concept's English (and known Korean synonyms). Test whether this direct cross-lingual similarity detects bad translations where back-translation failed (AUC ~0.5).
